channel.title: Bpmn on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Bpmn on Pi Stack

item.title: Flowable vs Activiti vs Camunda: Self-Hosted BPMN Engines Compared (2026)
item.description: Business Process Management (BPMN) engines are the backbone of enterprise workflow automation. They allow organizations to model, execute, and monitor complex business processes using the BPMN 2.0 standard. Whether you’re orchestrating approval workflows, handling case management, or building microservice choreography, a self-hosted BPMN engine gives you full control over your process data.
